• Interactive educational website about nuclear energy with sections on fission, fusion, reactor design, and Cold War history.
  • Features particle animations, scroll-triggered reveal effects, and interactive visualizations of nuclear processes.
  • Includes a horizontal timeline and parallax scrolling effects throughout the content.
    const particles = [];
    for (let i = 0; i < particleCount; i++) {
        particles.push(new Particle());
    }

This is an interactive educational website about nuclear energy featuring particle animations, scroll-triggered reveal effects, and interactive visualizations of nuclear processes. The site includes sections on fission, fusion, reactor design, and Cold War history, with a horizontal timeline and parallax scrolling effects throughout the content.
